dsl_rule.translation_notes: Horizontal trend line pattern translated using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) to represent support/resistance levels. Entry triggered by breakout above/below with volume confirmation (surge requirement). Exit triggered by reversal back through the breakout level. Hold period extended to 120 days to account for months-long horizontal consolidation before breakout. Pattern is bidirectional (both upside and downside breakouts valid per source).

backtest_rule.reason: Horizontal trend line pattern translated using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) to represent support/resistance levels. Entry triggered by breakout above/below with volume confirmation (surge requirement). Exit triggered by reversal back through the breakout level. Hold period extended to 120 days to account for months-long horizontal consolidation before breakout. Pattern is bidirectional (both upside and downside breakouts valid per source).

source_rule_text: Horizontal trend line (support and resistance) breakout pattern. Prices move horizontally for extended periods before breaking above resistance or below support.
